DISCOVERY 612, NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION; NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION - NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED, EXCEPT AS TO $1,065 AS THOSE FUNDS ARE EXEMPT FROM LEVY. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RETURN $2,735 TO JUDGMENT DEBTOR AND TO RELEASE $1,065 TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Notice Of Opposition To Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Sep-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Judgment Debtor's Claim Of Exemption is granted, except as to $1,065 as those funds are exempt from levy. The levying officer is directed to return $2,735 to Judgment Debtor and to release $1,065 to judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
